chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-468 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No. 2509/2025 3. For hearing of main case 10-03-2025 Malik Naeem Iqbal Advocate for the Petitioner M/s. Shahab Sarki and Muhammad Ghazali Advocates for the Respondent No.4 M/s. Aijaz Ahmed Memon and Shahid Nazir Memon Advocates for Respondent No.4 Dr. Habib-ur-Rehman solangi, Deputy Director Law, SEPA Imran Ali Abbasi, Deputy Director, Technical SEPA Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Pursuant to submission of report of SEPA that no adverse environmental impact is being caused by the activity being undertaken by the Respondent, learned counsel for the Petitioner states that the Petitioner does not press this petition, however, may remain at liberty to agitate any grievance before the forum of competent jurisdiction, if so advised. In view hereof, petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with listed application. Judge Judge Amjad PS
